text: Here in the first scene, watching people behind glass engaged in learning, I feel like an observer on the threshold of knowledge. There is an energy of curiosity but also a division; glass separates me from their collective experience. Moving to the second scene, I am surrounded by bold colors and the theme of R&D. It feels vibrant and stimulating—a museum-like tribute to innovation. I feel inspired yet reflective: knowledge is both something we witness from afar and something we actively construct. In both places, I am reminded how learning itself is a dynamic performance, always just beyond reach yet inviting participation.
